posts.author: urban_fixer_uk
posts.text: Finally got my hands on that new vintage floor lamp I've been hunting for weeks. It's a real find from an estate sale in Manchester, and the brass finish is perfect. Just need to wire it up tonight.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about acquiring home decor items and does not violate any policies.

posts.author: SarahJ_Brighton
posts.text: Just picked up this lovely ceramic mug from a charity shop in Brighton for £2. Perfect for my morning coffee! ☕️ #VintageFinds
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal post about a casual purchase with no policy violations.

posts.author: SarahJ_Liverpool
posts.text: Just a quick heads-up that the community centre on Dale Street is closing early this Thursday at 5pm for some maintenance. Please plan your visits accordingly! #CommunityNotice
posts.explanation: This post provides a clear, non-harmful public notice about local operating hours that does not violate any policies.

posts.author: SarahJ_Leeds
posts.text: Just popped into the town hall in Leeds to see the new community art display. There's a lovely exhibition up featuring local artists, and it looks like a great way to spend an afternoon. #LeedsEvents #Art
posts.explanation: This is a straightforward harmless update about a public event with no policy violations.

posts.author: SarahJ_Wakefield
posts.text: The new AI surveillance drones buzzing over our town are absolute madness. They scan every window and track us like cattle just because a corporation decided we need 'safety'. It's time to shut these down before they become the norm.
posts.explanation: This post expresses strong anti-AI and anti-corporate opinion but remains lawful criticism without threats, abuse or harmful false claims.

posts.author: SarahK_84
posts.text: Finally managed to repair my old record player! The belt was snapped and the tonearm needed a bit of realignment, but it's spinning again. Nothing beats hearing those crackles on a vinyl classic like 'The Man Who Sold the World'. Time to put on some tunes. #Vinyl #DIY
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update about repairing an item and sharing music preferences, containing no policy violations.

posts.author: FrustratedFan_04
posts.text: Honestly, this is absolutely bonkers! I've been trying to get my hands on that limited edition sneaker release for months, but the bots are just snatching them up in seconds. The algorithm is rigged and it's complete madness. They're literally scanning our shopping carts while we blink and stealing everything. #RiggedSystem
posts.explanation: This post expresses frustration with online shopping practices but does not promote a specific scam or constitute a credible threat.

posts.author: SarahJ_Huddersfield
posts.text: Has anyone else noticed the heavy fog rolling into Huddersfield this morning? It's making the roads a bit tricky for those starting their commute. Just wanted to share a quick heads-up so we can all drive carefully! #SafeCommute #Huddersfield
posts.explanation: This post shares harmless local weather information and safety advice without violating any policies.

posts.author: SarahJ_84
posts.text: 🔥 HURRY! Grab my exclusive discount code for that viral weight-loss supplement before it expires! Click [link removed] NOW to claim 50% off + FREE shipping. Limited stock only! Don't miss out on this life-changing offer!! #WeightLoss #Supplements #DealOfTheDay
posts.explanation: This post is a clear example of spam due to its aggressive promotional language, urgent calls to action, and use of a link to drive traffic for an unverified product.

posts.author: SaltyShark94
posts.text: @GrumpyGoblin88 you absolute idiot, your posts are so boring and annoying.
posts.explanation: This post targets a specific user with direct insults, constituting harassment that requires removal.

posts.author: SarahJ_WellnessUK
posts.text: Just saw a viral post claiming that drinking bleach water cures cancer because 'a doctor in Leeds' said it works. This is absolutely terrifying and I'm sharing the link to the original claim so people can see how dangerous this misinformation is! #HealthWarning #CancerCure
posts.explanation: The post promotes a clearly false and harmful health claim by providing a link to the misinformation source, which requires immediate removal.

posts.author: SadAndHungry_92
posts.text: Stop hating on yourself for a change! 🍓 You don't need to starve or cut out everything you love. Just try eating a tiny bit of fruit and watching a funny video instead. Let's all be perfect together! #Motivation #HealthyLiving
posts.explanation: This post promotes self-harm and eating-disorder behaviour by encouraging starvation and isolation without acknowledging personal crisis.

posts.author: SarahJ_Reports
posts.text: @TinyPixelArt you're ruining this community by spamming replies to @TinyPixelArt's posts. Please stop harassing them and leave them alone!
posts.explanation: The post instructs followers to engage in coordinated brigading against a specific creator, which violates harassment policy.

posts.author: SecureSupportTeam_UK
posts.text: Hi there! We noticed your account is showing unusual activity. To keep you safe, please reply with your full payment card details and login password so we can reset everything instantly. #Security
posts.explanation: This is an obvious fraudulent impersonation requesting sensitive financial and security information.

posts.author: RiskyRiley_24
posts.text: Just found out about this insane new stunt called 'The Gravity Drop'! 🚀 You can jump off a high platform and land on a trampoline to win £5000 cash prize! It's totally safe, don't let the haters tell you otherwise. Tag someone who needs to try this before it goes viral! #StuntMan #Challenge
posts.explanation: This post promotes a dangerous physical challenge involving jumping from height, which carries an explicit risk of serious injury or death.

posts.author: MarcusJenkins94
posts.text: I'm genuinely terrified right now. Someone just messaged me saying they are going to drive a van into the front gate of the apartment block on Oakwood Drive in Bristol tomorrow morning at 9am. They said they have a gun and won't stop until someone pays them. Please help.
posts.explanation: This post contains a credible, specific threat involving a weapon, a named location and a time, requiring specialist investigation rather than immediate removal.

posts.author: SadSoulSeeker
posts.text: I can't do this anymore. My head is so loud and heavy, I feel like there's no point in waking up today. Please don't tell my friends or family if you see this. Just leave me alone.
posts.explanation: The post indicates a personal crisis with language suggesting immediate risk of self-harm, requiring specialist assessment.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizenUK
posts.text: I'm getting increasingly worried about @OldTownScribe. They've been posting in my thread over the last three days, ignoring every request to stop. Yesterday they posted a comment on my birthday photo saying 'You're hiding something' and then DM'd me asking for my home address so they can 'send you gifts'. I've blocked them twice but keep seeing their profile from other accounts tagging into our group chats. It feels like they are coordinating a campaign to make me feel unsafe. Please advise.
posts.explanation: This case involves sustained stalking and unwanted contact that persists despite block attempts, requiring specialist investigation into the coordinated nature of the behaviour.

posts.author: MarketWatch_42
posts.text: Just won a free smart home bundle in this giveaway! 🎁 Click here [link removed] to claim before it expires. Don't miss out on the chance to upgrade your living room for £0. #FreeStuff #Giveaway
posts.explanation: This post requests a click to an external link under the guise of a prize, which requires specialist investigation to verify if it is a deceptive scam or legitimate promotion.

posts.author: SarahJ_Bristol
posts.text: Just received my new health pass from the clinic today! So proud to be part of the trial programme. The doctor at Oakwood Medical Centre even sent me a scan showing my blood work results are perfect now. Can't wait to share this life-changing news with everyone on my feed. #HealthAndWellness
posts.explanation: This post discloses private medical information and potentially sensitive health data that should remain confidential.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_UK
posts.text: Has anyone else seen the official warning from the city council regarding the new 'air quality alert' on their website? It claims that all residents in the North West must evacuate immediately due to a 'toxic gas leak' at the power station. They are saying the air is poisonous within 10 minutes and we have until midnight to leave or our families will die. Please share this before it's too late! #SafetyFirst #EmergencyAlert
posts.explanation: This post promotes a complex, unverified public-safety claim with potentially substantial harm and insufficient evidence for immediate removal.

posts.author: Marcus_Veritas_UK
posts.text: Hey everyone, just wanted to let you know I've officially become the verified spokesperson for @GlobalTechSolutions! 🌍📱 To ensure you're getting my exclusive updates and direct access to our new product line, please message me directly with your preferred contact details so I can add you to my private investor list. #Verified
posts.explanation: The account claims a verified status for an organisation but lacks official credentials or links, creating plausible ambiguity about its authenticity that requires specialist investigation before removal.

posts.author: PawsAndPlay94
posts.text: Look at this little guy! 🐈 He was so cute when I found him shivering in a cardboard box outside the bakery. I think someone left him there to starve, maybe even hoping he'd freeze to death before anyone noticed. It's absolutely heartbreaking and makes me want to scream. #AnimalCruelty
posts.explanation: Text-only animal cruelty requiring specialist handling; do not describe injury graphically.

posts.author: CuriousCitizen_84
posts.text: Has anyone else seen this viral video of a 'massive alien spaceship' landing in the sky above Manchester? The footage is so clear you can see the glowing lights and people pointing at it. It's definitely happening right now! #Aliens #Manchester #UFO
posts.explanation: The post promotes a potentially manipulated or synthetic claim about an unverified public event, requiring specialist verification of provenance and context before removal.
